questionHtml:
A net force of 8.0 N accelerates a 4.0 kg body from rest to a speed of 5.0 m s−1.

What is the work done by the force?


A.  50 J

B.  40 J

C.  32 J

D.  20 J

meta.title: A net force of 8.0 N accelerates a 4.0 kg body from rest to a speed of 5.0 m s−1. What is the work done by the force? A. 50 J B. 40 J C. 32 J D. 20 J
